post.summary: Generate a 3D printable file from an image
post.description: Upload a photo (JPEG/PNG) and receive a watertight 3D mesh file suitable for FDM/SLA printing. Supports 3MF, STL, and OBJ output.

post.summary: Generate a 3D model from a text description
post.description: Provide a text description of the desired object and optionally an image. Returns a 3D mesh file, or a fallback prompt if image generation is unavailable.

200.description: The generated 3D mesh file, or a JSON fallback response

example.message: Image generation unavailable. Use the prompt to generate an image manually.

post.summary: Analyze an image without generating a mesh
post.description: Upload an image and receive metadata and analysis without running full 3D inference.
Upload a mesh file and get orientation analysis, material estimates, and printability issue detection for a specific printer.

post.summary: Estimate printing cost for a mesh
post.description: Upload a mesh and get a detailed cost breakdown including filament usage, print time, and electricity cost.

post.summary: Split a mesh into printer-sized parts
post.description: Upload a mesh that exceeds your build volume and split it into interlocking parts with alignment pins and holes.
Upload a mesh and get a quality score (0-100) with per-metric breakdown.

post.summary: Repair a broken mesh for 3D printing
post.description: Upload a broken mesh and receive a repaired, watertight version.

post.summary: Batch process multiple images to 3D models
post.description: Upload multiple images and receive per-item processing results.

get.description: Returns detailed specs for all supported printer models.

get.summary: Discover printers on the local network
get.description: Scan the local network for Bambu Lab printers via SSDP discovery.

post.summary: Send a print job to a Bambu printer
post.description: Upload a 3MF or gcode file and send it directly to a Bambu Lab printer by IP address.

get.description: Returns service status and version. Use for liveness probes.

get.summary: List supported export formats and printers
get.description: Returns all supported 3D file formats and known printer presets.
Returns cache hit/miss counts, total size, and number of cached entries.
Returns the full Terms of Service text.
Returns a confirmation that TOS acceptance was recorded. Actual tracking is done client-side via localStorage.
Returns the most recently saved benchmark report, if any.

get.summary: Get API info, version, and feature list
get.description: Returns version, supported features, formats, and printers.

post.summary: Predict print failures for a mesh
post.description: Upload a mesh and get a failure risk score (0-100) with specific risks identified.

get.description: Returns local analytics: generation counts, format/backend breakdowns, average durations.

post.description: Register a new user and get API key.
Login and get JWT + API key.

get.description: Check remaining quota for an API key.
Get usage history for an API key.
Get this month's usage stats.

post.description: Create an additional API key (requires JWT).
Submit multiple images for batch async generation. Returns list of task_ids.

get.description: List registered webhooks.

post.description: Register a webhook URL for generation events.
Submit async generation job. Returns task_id immediately.

get.description: Check async generation task status.
Download result of completed async generation.
Get async generation queue status.
List generated models for the authenticated user.
Get details for a specific generated model.
Download a generated model file.
Get generation stats for the authenticated user.
Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoint.
Detailed health check with subsystem status.
Admin dashboard with real-time stats.
Serve the Three.js 3D preview page.

hits.title: Hits
hits.description: Number of cache hits since startup

misses.title: Misses
misses.description: Number of cache misses since startup

size_bytes.title: Size Bytes
size_bytes.description: Total size of cached files in bytes
